---
title: strings
subtitle: python
---

```{css css_custom, code=readLines("~/github/how2/_css_custom.css"), echo=FALSE}
```
```{r knitr_config, code=readLines("~/github/how2/_knitr_config.R"), echo=FALSE}
```

*********************************************************************

## indexing

```{python}
mystring = "abcdefghijklmnopqrstuvwxyz"
mystring[0]
mystring[-1]
mystring[1:5]
```

*********************************************************************

## methods

```{python}
mystring = "hELLO you"
mystring.upper()
mystring.lower()
mystring.capitalize()
mystring.isdigit()
mystring.split()
mystring.split("LL")
mystring.strip("h")
```
